definition.featurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="feature_container" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><value name="feature"><block type="feature_tree_simple"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="type">jungle bush</field><field name="base_height">1</field><field name="height_variation_a">0</field><field name="height_variation_b">0</field><field name="force_dirt">FALSE</field><field name="ignore_vines">FALSE</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This block represents a jungle bush, and should generate during the VEGETAL_DECORATION stage.</comment><value name="dirt"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:PetrifiedRottenOakWood</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block that will be placed under the trunk</comment></block></value><value name="trunk"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:PetrifiedRottenOakLog</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the trunk</comment></block></value><value name="foliage"><block type="blockstate_selector"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="block">CUSTOM:PetrifiedWealdFoliage</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">This is the block used for the leaves</comment></block></value><value name="root_placer"><block type="root_placer_none"><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Jungle bushes don't have roots</comment></block></value></block></value><next><block type="placement_rarity"><field name="rarity">3</field><next><block type="placement_count"><value name="count"><block type="int_provider_uniform"><field name="min">1</field><field name="max">4</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_in_square"><next><block type="placement_heightmap"><field name="heightmap">MOTION_BLOCKING_NO_LEAVES</field><next><block type="placement_block_predicate_filter"><value name="condition"><block type="block_predicate_solid"><field name="x">0</field><field name="y">-1</field><field name="z">0</field></block></value><next><block type="placement_biome_filter"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
